title: Update company name and slogan across all UI

requirements.summary: Replace all occurrences of the company name throughout the application with 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)'
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title reads 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)'
The header/nav bar displays the full company name
The footer displays the full company name
No old or partial company name variants remain visible in any language (EN/HI/OD)

file_operations.description: Update the <title> element to display 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' so the browser tab shows the full company name

Update all company name translation entries across English, Hindi, and Odia. Replace existing company name values in 'header.companyName', 'footer.companyName', 'hero.title', and any other keys that reference the company name with 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)'. For Hindi and Odia translations, provide appropriate translations that convey the same full company name including the parenthetical unit designation

Review and update any hardcoded company name references to use the i18n translation key. Ensure the header displays the full company name 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' via the translation system

Review and update any hardcoded company name references to use the i18n translation key. Ensure the hero section headline displays the full company name 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' via the translation system

Review and update any hardcoded company name references to use the i18n translation key. Ensure the footer brand info section displays the full company name 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' via the translation system

Review and update any hardcoded company name references (including references to 'Bhagyalaxmi' in the 'Why Choose Bhagyalaxmi' section) to use the i18n translation key and display the full company name 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' via the translation system

Review and update any hardcoded company name references to use the i18n translation key. Ensure the section title and card content display the full company name 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' where applicable via the translation system

requirements.summary: Update the company slogan to 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy' in all translation entries and components
acceptanceCriteria: The hero section tagline reads 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy'
The footer tagline/slogan reads 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy'
The slogan is consistent across all supported languages (EN/HI/OD) — Hindi and Odia translations should convey the same meaning
No previous slogan text remains anywhere in the UI

file_operations.description: Update all slogan/tagline translation entries across English, Hindi, and Odia. Replace existing slogan values in 'hero.subtitle', 'footer.tagline', and any other keys that reference the company slogan with 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy'. For Hindi and Odia translations, provide appropriate translations that convey the same empowerment and clean energy message specific to Odisha
Review and update any hardcoded slogan/tagline references to use the i18n translation key. Ensure the hero section tagline displays 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy' via the translation system

Review and update any hardcoded slogan/tagline references to use the i18n translation key. Ensure the footer displays 'Empowering Odisha with Clean Energy' as the company tagline via the translation system
